requestedIntent: Require full BMAD and guarded story close to prove the changed behavior at the touched runtime surface.
limitations: Enforcement applies to typed full-bmad and guarded PASS gates.
Lightweight lanes enforce surface validation through ACEF_LIGHTWEIGHT_RUN.json instead of typed gate-verdict evidence.

The validator checks that every declared worker-scope surface has successful gate surfaceEvidence backed by typed runner-proof evidence, uses path-name inference to catch obvious underdeclared surfaces, and requires at least one durable write/read evidence signal for state-changing work; inference is heuristic.
